scope: 10 firmographic companies excluding China and Hong Kong

api_comparison.Fields Returned: Employee Count; Founded Year; Headcount Growth (1 Year); Headquarters Location; Industry; LinkedIn URL; Ownership Type; Revenue / Revenue Band; Sub-Industry (NAICS/SIC); Website Domain
api_comparison.Free-Tier Limitations: Exact free credit allocation and paid gating were not confirmed from the API response. Observed call limits: 600/day, 200/hour, 50/minute.
api_comparison.Paid-Tier Benefits: Higher usage limits and possible richer fields/exports; exact benefits must be confirmed against the Apollo account plan.
api_comparison.Notes: Fields not returned or not independently validated: Legal Name; Number of Sites/Locations (Singapore + Global); Total Funding Raised. Raw responses and usage trace are saved.

api_trace.Authentication Type: API Key (X-Api-Key used in successful run)
api_trace.Free Credits / Tokens: Not Verified from API docs/account response; observed endpoint daily limit was 600 calls.
api_trace.Gated Fields: Legal Name; Number of Sites/Locations (Singapore + Global); Total Funding Raised
api_trace.Free Tier Limitation: Legal registered name, verified Singapore + global site count, and total funding were not returned by this endpoint response.
api_trace.Paid Plan Cost: Not Verified - pricing is account/plan dependent and was not returned by API.
api_trace.Paid Tier Benefits: Potentially higher limits and richer enrichment/exports; exact gated fields require plan confirmation.
api_trace.Ease of Integration: 4/5 - straightforward API-key auth and JSON parsing; usage/credit tracing required extra endpoint and master-key access.
api_trace.API Documentation Quality: 4/5 - endpoint and usage documentation are usable, but plan/gated-field behavior needs account verification.
api_trace.Remarks: Observed organization enrich consumed count moved from 31 to 41. This means 10 credits were consumed across 10 successful company calls; remaining/left_over decreased by the same amount.
api_trace.Estimated Cost per 100 Companies: About 100 Apollo organization-enrichment credits based on observed 1 credit per successful company call; currency cost not verified.
